code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001'});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});export const apiBaseUrl=api.defaults.baseURL;export default api;
